texto: Though often scoffed at by “serious” writers, science fiction worms its way into our cultural psyche in interesting ways, and not just as predictors of technology. Many of these writers translate the –isms of our times into imagined futures populated with characters coping with the consequences.
explicacao: Citação de Frank Daniels III sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Though often scoffed at by “serious” writers, science fiction worms its way into our cultural psy…” articula tempo, futurism, science-fiction em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como science-fiction.
